calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for and with Albert Lew.

Ms. Lofdahl reported that Mr. Lew received the checks for the life insurance proceeds last week, that he went on Saturday to set up the blocked accounts and has the receipts for the blocked accounts and will file them today. In addition, Ms. Lofdahl informed the court that Alliance (insurance company) sent two additional checks for $12,000.00 for each child and that they are requesting an order to deposit said funds to the same blocked accounts. The court directed Ms. Lofdahl to file an ex parte petition for an order depositing additional funds into the blocked accounts. The status on filing of receipts for the blocked accounts was continued to February 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

PETITION Verified Petition For Order Re Deposit Of Money Belonging To A Minor
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for and with Albert Lew.

Ms. Lofdahl presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the request for monthly payments from the annuity. The Court granted the Petition to Deposit Funds Into a Blocked Account for a lump sum payment (subject to review of the order). Ms. Lofdahl presented a revised order which has eliminated language regarding "Guardian Ad Litem".

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
